task_completion.description: Load the ExamAnxiety.csv dataset in JASP
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JASP application is open and the data view shows the loaded dataset with columns such as 'Exam' and 'Revise'.

task_completion.description: Create a computed column named 'Efficiency' using the specified formula
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new column named 'Efficiency' is visible in the JASP data view, and/or the compute column formula window is visible showing the formula 'Exam / (Revise + 1)'.

task_completion.description: Export the updated dataset to efficiency_data.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A JASP export dialog is visible saving the data to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_data.csv', or a file manager/terminal shows the newly created 'efficiency_data.csv' file in the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Perform Descriptive Statistics on the 'Efficiency' variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Descriptives' analysis panel is open in JASP, and 'Efficiency' is listed in the Variables box or is the subject of the Descriptive Statistics results table.

task_completion.description: Include a density plot in the Descriptive Statistics
task_completion.visual_evidence: A density plot for the 'Efficiency' variable is visible in the JASP results panel.

task_completion.description: Save the JASP project to efficiency_analysis.jasp
task_completion.visual_evidence: A JASP save dialog is visible saving the project to '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_analysis.jasp', or the JASP window title reflects 'efficiency_analysis.jasp'.

integrity.description: Agent used the JASP GUI for data manipulation and analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the JASP graphical interface (menus, formula editor, analysis panels) rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating the outputs.

integrity.description: Density plot is generated natively within JASP
integrity.visual_evidence: The density plot appears inside the JASP results panel with standard JASP styling, not in an external image viewer or generic plotting window.

integrity.description: Files are saved using JASP's native export/save functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: File paths for the CSV export and JASP project save are entered into JASP's native dialog boxes, rather than being created via terminal commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input dataset is located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv and contains 'Exam' and 'Revise' columns. The target computed column must be named 'Efficiency'. The exported CSV must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_data.csv. The JASP project must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/efficiency_analysis.jasp.
